AnimateAnyMesh is a feed-forward 4D foundation model designed for universal mesh animation. It takes a static 3D mesh and a text prompt as input to generate high-quality animations efficiently in seconds.

Deptry is a Python command-line tool designed to identify and report dependency issues in Python projects. It checks for unused, missing, and transitive dependencies by analyzing imported modules against the project's declared dependencies.

Termora is a cross-platform terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS, and Linux, built with Kotlin/JVM. It aims for full platform support and offers features like a built-in key manager, X11 forwarding, SSH-Agent integration, and GUI-based SFTP file management.

DeepTutor is an open-source, agent-native personalized tutoring system designed to provide interactive learning experiences. It leverages large language models and multi-agent systems, incorporating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for enhanced knowledge retrieval and personalized responses.

PersonaPlex is a real-time, full-duplex conversational speech model that allows for persona control via text prompts and voice conditioning. It is built on the Moshi architecture and trained on a mix of synthetic and real conversations to produce natural, low-latency spoken interactions with a consistent persona.

вң… Local, on-device indexing and search
вң… Supports markdown, meeting transcripts, documentation, and knowledge bases
вң… Combines BM25 full-text search, vector semantic search, and LLM re-ranking
вң… Uses node-llama-cpp with GGUF models for local LLM operations
вң… Contextual indexing for enhanced LLM decision-making
вң… CLI interface with commands for collection management, embedding, searching, and retrieval
вң… JSON and file output formats optimized for AI agent workflows
вң… MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for tighter integration with AI clients (e.g., Claude)
вң… HTTP transport for a shared, long-lived MCP server

QMD is a local, on-device search engine designed to index and query personal documents, notes, and knowledge bases. It combines traditional keyword search, semantic vector search, and LLM re-ranking to provide high-quality, context-aware results, making it ideal for integration with AI agents.
